summary: Iteration 200: Manuale Utente Module - All features working correctly. Backend 12/12 tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with 7 chapters, 8 FAQ items, PDF download, and sidebar navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/manuale/contenuti returns correct structure: 7 capitoli, 8 FAQ, versione 2.0
GET /api/manuale/genera-pdf returns valid PDF (177.8 KB) with application/pdf content-type
PDF includes cover page with company logo, TOC, 7 chapters, FAQ table, and QR code
POST /api/preventivatore/calcola with peso_kg_target=2500 returns correct calculation (totale_vendita: 8192.45€)
GET /api/preventivi correctly excludes 'eliminato' status from list
Frontend /manuale page shows 7 collapsible chapters with proper icons and content
Frontend FAQ section shows 8 FAQ items with working search functionality
Frontend 'Scarica Manuale PDF' button triggers PDF download successfully
Sidebar navigation shows 'Guida all'Uso' under 'Impostazioni' group with correct data-testid='nav-manuale'
AI Predittivo Stima Rapida works correctly - entering 2500kg shows calculated totals matching backend response
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 200 verified Manuale Utente Module features. Key findings: (1) GET /api/manuale/contenuti returns 7 chapters (intro, preventivi, commesse, sicurezza, risorse_umane, tracciabilita, dashboard) and 8 FAQ items. (2) GET /api/manuale/genera-pdf returns valid PDF (~178KB) with proper headers. (3) Frontend /manuale page at data-testid='manuale-page' shows collapsible chapters with data-testid='chapter-{id}' and FAQ section with data-testid='faq-section'. (4) Download button at data-testid='btn-download-manuale' triggers PDF download. (5) Sidebar shows 'Guida all'Uso' under Impostazioni at data-testid='nav-manuale'. (6) AI Predittivo Stima Rapida (POST /api/preventivatore/calcola with peso_kg_target) works correctly. (7) Preventivi list excludes 'eliminato' status.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/manuale/genera-pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF (177.8 KB) with application/pdf content-type
backend_endpoints.POST /api/preventivatore/calcola: PASS - Stima Rapida with peso_kg_target=2500 returns correct calculation
backend_endpoints.Auth required tests: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without auth

AI Predittivo (/preventivatore).stima_rapida: PASS - Peso input and 'Calcola con peso manuale' button work

Preventivi List (/preventivi).no_eliminato: PASS - No 'eliminato' status visible in list
